Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Timothy J. Kodani, Esq., of Law Offices of Timothy J. Kodani, Tel. 415.951.4640, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DEVENDER PATEL, JON A. OLDER LIVING TRUST and THE BAKER HOTEL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. The moving parties did not provide courtesy copies of motion as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
